items.title: Five Notre Dame Football Photos for a Friday: Michigan Sucks
items.summary: Happy Friday, and Happy Juneteenth everyone. I wasn’t sure what theme to go with today for our old Notre Dame photos series, but then I remembered that Michigan sucks everyday.

items.title: Looking Back at Notre Dame’s Glam Rock Night against Maryland in 2011
items.summary: When Notre Dame fans look back on the Brian Kelly era, the memories often center around explosive passing attacks, dramatic finishes, and the stars who filled the highlight reels. But every now and then, a game comes along that reminds us football can still be won the old-fashioned way. On November 12, 2011, against Maryland […]

items.title: The three most interesting stretches of Notre Dame’s 2026 football schedule
items.summary: Football schedules are a funny thing. Notre Dame’s schedule, for example, has received a ton of criticism from fans and foes alike […]
